steps: Go to https://app.hellosign.com and log in (or create a free account)
Click your account name in the top-right corner and select 'Settings'
Navigate to the 'API' tab (or go directly to https://app.hellosign.com/home/myAccount#api)
Your API key is displayed under the 'API Key' section
Click 'Reveal' to view the key, then copy it

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Dropbox Sign API key. Used as the username in HTTP Basic Auth (password is empty). The gateway sends it as a Basic-encoded Authorization header.

notes: The API uses HTTP Basic Auth: the API key is the username and the password is empty
Free accounts can fully test the API by setting test_mode=true in requests
Each account can have up to 4 active API keys simultaneously
API keys can be rotated at any time from the same settings page
Production API calls (without test_mode) count against your plan quota

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated account details to verify the API key
